senses.gloss: elative degree of حَبِيب (ḥabīb):; dearer; dearest, favourite

examples.text: وكانت الرابعة وهي ربيبة الوزير عبد الله تسكن في دارها. وهي أحبهن إليّ.
examples.english: My fourth wife, who was the daughter-in-law of the Wazir ‘Abdallah, used to live in her own house, and she was my favourite amongst them.

senses.gloss: elative degree of حَبِيب (ḥabīb):; more agreeable; most agreeable
